title: juniperus monticola subsp. compacta
intro: Juniperus monticola subsp. compacta, also known as compact mountain juniper, is a compact shrub-like evergreen tree that belongs to the cypress family (Cupressaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Juniperus monticola subsp. compacta can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into salves and creams for topical application.
